label: Growing trend: real lift on top of the climb
verdict: Real lift on top of an already-rising trend. Against the no-ad counterfactual the campaign added an estimated 96K extra streams over the window (95% credible interval 82K to 110K), a lift of 13.1%. The interval sits well above zero, so the effect is real rather than noise. Note the surface read overstates it: observed streams run +87.5% above the pre-campaign baseline, but the trend was already climbing, so much of that rise is the trend, not the ad. The 13.1% causal lift is the number to defend.
